long_description:
Nintendo 3DS homebrew utility for converting GBA EEPROM save files between emulator and `open_agb_firm` formats.

GBA games save progress in 3 different types of .sav files.
EEPROM type .sav files need to be converted/fixed if you want to migrate from emulator to `open_agb_firm` or vice versa. This tool will convert those files for you.

I reccomend checking my GitHub repository for more information:
https://github.com/Foxy-no/GESF3
